name: Nora Mill Buckwheat Buttermilk Pancakes
recipeIngredient: 3 tablespoons NORA MILL whole wheat flour
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve the dry yeast in the lukewarm water.
2. Add the buttermilk, both flours, and salt to the yeast mixture. Mix well until a smooth batter forms.
3. Cover the batter and let it set overnight at room temperature.
4. The next day, heat a griddle or non-stick pan over medium-high heat.
5. Pour small portions of batter onto the hot griddle, cooking each side until golden brown.
